title: The Maharani
caption: The Maharani is a tribute to sovereign grace — a collection inspired by the regal women who defined eras through elegance, authority, and timeless beauty. Designed with commanding silhouettes and intricate detailing, each piece evokes the grandeur of royal courts while remaining effortlessly wearable for the modern queen.

title: The Regal Bloom
caption: The Regal Bloom is an ode to nature in its most majestic form — where delicate florals meet the grandeur of royal design. This collection reimagines blooming motifs through intricate craftsmanship, creating pieces that feel both soft and sovereign.

title: The Bridal Edit
caption: Curated for the Moment That Lasts Forever. The Bridal Edit is a definitive curation of statement jewellery crafted for life’s most significant celebration. Designed for the modern bride who values heritage yet seeks individuality, this collection brings together iconic silhouettes and masterful detailing in one cohesive narrative.

title: The Classics
caption: The Classics is a refined selection of enduring designs that transcend trends and seasons. Built on the philosophy that true luxury lies in permanence, this collection brings together foundational pieces every jewellery wardrobe should hold.
